title: Classical Music Festival in Nice | Mas du Chanoine
description: Classical Music Festival in Nice: French Riviera event near our guesthouse.
paragraphs: For the festival "C'est pas classique" at the Palace of Congress Nice Acropolis, more than 60 free concerts are given by more than 500 artists from orchestras, conservatories or groups of the Maritime Alps musicians. Do not miss this musical rendezvous in Nice!
